description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. She has voluminous, wavy hair styled in a loose, shoulder-length fashion. Her attire consists of a sleeveless, fitted top paired with a high-waisted, knee-length skirt, both of which are form-fitting and simple in design. She wears heeled shoes with ankle straps, adding a touch of formality to her appearance. The facial features are soft and stylized, with a neutral expression. The overall look suggests a modern, urban pedestrian, suitable for city or neighborhood environments.
description: A stylized adult woman with wavy hair, wearing a sleeveless top, fitted skirt, and heeled shoes, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, sleeveless top, skirt, and both shoes clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the volume of the hair, and the side silhouette of the outfit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hair, the fitted skirt, and the backs of the legs and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, hair volume, and the side of the outfit similar to the left view.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and high-waisted knee-length skirt
